supabase_auth_leaked_password_protection.missing: Production dashboard evidence that leaked password protection is enabled.
supabase_auth_leaked_password_protection.ready_condition: Redacted evidence exists and security owner approves.

production_sql_backup.missing: Real production backup id/snapshot evidence and restore availability.
production_sql_backup.ready_condition: Backup exists outside repo and restore availability is confirmed.

production_revert_restore_drill.ready_condition: Revert path is tested or explicitly accepted by production owner.

vercel_production_envs.missing: Secure verification of real Production env values without printing secrets.
vercel_production_envs.ready_condition: All required env names exist with correct non-placeholder values and safe public exposure.

paypal_live.missing: Live credentials, live product/plans, live webhook id, signature verification, controlled subscription evidence.
paypal_live.ready_condition: Live subscription lifecycle is verified and webhook signature is trusted.

google_oauth_production.missing: Production OAuth client, exact redirect URIs, Supabase provider evidence, login smoke.
google_oauth_production.ready_condition: Production-domain Google login succeeds with exact redirects.

human_production_approval.missing: Explicit release window, owners, rollback owner, and deploy approval.
human_production_approval.ready_condition: Written approval exists after every blocker is READY.
